items.speaker: Yangyang
items.text: What's the matter? Are you alright?

options.text: I may have resonated with a Tacet Discord.

items.speaker: Yangyang
items.text: I was worried... You just stood there and gazed into the distance. You were unresponsive when I tried talking to you. What did you see?

items.speaker: Rover
items.text: It felt as if I was seeing through the eyes of a Tacet Discord. I think... I saw what was happening in the Norfall Barrens.

items.speaker: Yangyang
items.text: An imposing warrior wielding the power of a <ano=teal dragon>Qingloong</ano>...  The Qingloong is the Midnight Rangers' emblem. It's also the symbol of General Jiyan, the leader of all Midnight Rangers.

items.speaker: Yangyang
items.text: The front lines are not far from here. General Jiyan must be there, fighting alongside our soldiers to keep the Tacet Discords away.

items.speaker: Yangyang
items.text: It doesn't seem like a coincidence. We arrived near the battlefield right when General Jiyan was leading an attack against the Tacet Discords...

items.speaker: Yangyang
items.text: A woman in red who can control the Tacet Discords...

items.speaker: Yangyang
items.text: Could it be... One of the Fractsidus...

items.speaker: Yangyang
items.text: Your vision... It might be what was happening on the battlefield not far away...

items.speaker: Yangyang
items.text: The battle itself is a clear sign of an anomaly.

items.speaker: Yangyang
items.text: The Streams from the Norfall Barrens feel more suffocating than ever.

items.speaker: Yangyang
items.text: Rover... something on that battlefield must be connected to you, though we have no idea what it is.

items.speaker: Yangyang
items.text: But I didn't hear anything... or sense any frequencies.

items.speaker: Rover
items.text: According to Baizhi, the leaf showed residual fluctuations of Tacet Discords.

items.speaker: Rover
items.text: Those fluctuations pointed to a certain set of coordinates.

items.speaker: Yangyang
items.text: And that is... Qichi Village, in the Central Plains.
